case_title: JORGE VILLACORTA VS. YASUA BABLI et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VILLACORTA, JORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BABLI, YASUA AN INDIVIDUAL KUSALA, ANYU AN INDIVIDUAL $4,676.12 PRINCIPAL, $14.70 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,870.82, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
